title: Deep dive: Pharma CEO compensation report
snippet: Who is the highest paid CEO in all of pharma? In this special edition, BioSpace examines top paid CEOs and their pay packages.

title: FDA rejects Unicycive and Sobi filings over contract manufacturing deficiencies
snippet: Unicycive Therapeutics and Sobi received complete response letters for kidney disease and gout filings, respectively, after the FDA found fault with their manufacturing partners.

title: Extracellular Vesicles from Mesenchymal Stem Cells Alleviate Spinal Cord Injury via the miR-486-5p/PTEN/PI3K/AKT Pathway.
snippet: Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) is a severe central nervous system disorder with limited effective treatments. Mesenchymal stem cell (MSC)-derived exosomes have emerged as important mediators of intercellular communication and carry microRNAs with potential neuroprotective properties. This study aimed to explore the role and underlying mechanism of human umbilical...

title: Perioperative tislelizumab for early-stage hepatocellular carcinoma: A phase II trial with integrated tumour microenvironment profiling and predictive modeling.
publicationName: Drug resistance updates : reviews and commentaries in antimicrobial and anticancer chemotherapy
journalName: Drug resistance updates : reviews and commentaries in antimicrobial and anticancer chemotherapy
snippet: It is controversial whether monotherapy with immunotherapeutics is effective in early-stage hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). We evaluated immunotherapy monotherapy as an initial neoadjuvant strategy. This prospective, single-arm, phase II trial of an adaptive neoadjuvant strategy enrolled patients with resectable, early-stage HCC. All patients received tisle...
